articles.title: Is Cain Dingle leaving Emmerdale and does he die?
articles.description: All you need to know about Cain Dingle's Emmerdale storyline, and whether he could leave the village – amid a murder story and cancer news.

articles.title: My Father Has Been Missing Since I Was Three — Today I Heard a Man Humming Our Secret Lullaby
articles.description: Young Chinedu and his mother Yetunde lived in the shadow of a tragic accident. When Chinedu hears a stranger hum a private song, a twenty-year lie finally breaks.

articles.title: Johor records drop in dengue cases, says Ling
articles.description: JOHOR BARU: Johor has recorded a 7.3% drop in cumulative dengue cases with 2,132 cases in the epidemiological week 18/2026, compared with 2,299 cases in 18/2025.

articles.title: My stepmom burnt my college acceptance letter— She was humbled when a stranger showed up at our door
articles.description: After her stepmom burns her college acceptance letter, a young woman's future seems lost—until a stranger arrives with her late mother's secret message.

articles.title: State clears 70 per cent of DNA backlog, returns to testing in July
articles.description: After clearing 600 samples linked to rape investigations, the state laboratory director is confident new cases could soon be turned around within two weeks.

articles.title: Walking Tour, Parade To Mark Memorial Day In New Hope-Lambertville
articles.description: Historians in New Hope are planning a walking tour, while Lamberville will remember the fallen with a parade and ceremony.

M4 Gloucestershire LIVE: Animals on motorway causes mammoth delays as traffic held

articles.description: Firefighting robots in Sharjah’s warehouses and industrial zones improve emergency response, reduce suppression time and support technology-driven civil defence operations.

articles.title: Customs seize nearly RM1.19mil in drugs, cash and liquor at KLIA
articles.description: PETALING JAYA: Nearly RM1.19mil worth of drugs, cash and liquor linked to smuggling syndicates were seized by the Customs Department at Kuala Lumpur International Airport last month.

articles.title: New inquiry into deadly runway collision at Denver’s airport
articles.description: There are new developments in the deadly runway collision that killed a trespasser who was struck by a jet ahead of takeoff at Denver International Airport. Investigators are now looking into how the trespasser managed to hop a fence and gain access to the runway. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz reports.

articles.description: Authorities say the man left a minimum-security facility late Saturday night.

articles.title: Toddler dies after falling from North York apartment building: police
articles.description: A child died Sunday after falling from a high-rise apartment building in North York, Ont. The circumstances of the toddler's death are under investigation, said Toronto police.

articles.title: Fil-Am mother-daughter duo sentenced to prison in public school fraud case
articles.description: LOS ANGELES – A Filipino American mother and her daughter were sentenced this week to prison in the United States District Court for the Northern Mariana Islands in a procurement fraud and money laundering scheme targeting the public school system. articles.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship head to Nebraska
articles.description: The Americans evacuated from the deadly hantavirus cruise ship are on their way to the Nebraska Medical Center’s state of the art National Quarantine Unit. It is unclear how many of the Americans, who are all asymptomatic, will end up staying there and for how long. NBC News’ Camila Bernal has the latest.

articles.title: Passengers are evacuated from cruise ship tied to hantavirus outbreak
articles.description: Passengers and crew from a cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak were evacuated Sunday after the vessel anchored off Spain's Canary Islands. Global health officials have sought to calm fears about the passengers' return to their home countries by vowing to closely monitor any signs of disease.

articles.title: Man charged after shooting at Durham's Silver Spoon leaves another critically injured
articles.description: Police say a man who tried to stop a dispute was shot at a Durham restaurant. He's in critical condition.

articles.description: Financial guru Wes Edens was the target of a billion-dollar extortion scheme allegedly carried out by an ex-lover, the Wall Street Journal reported.

articles.description: A Toronto city councillor says Ontario Provincial Police are investigating allegations against him.

articles.title: Paradise island horror as North Carolina grandpa goes missing while snorkeling in Hawaii

articles.title: UK Army parachutes onto remote Atlantic island over suspected hantavirus case
articles.description: The British military parachuted medics and emergency supplies into Tristan da Cunha after a resident was suspected of contracting hantavirus.

articles.title: Cop dad shoots his two children, 9 & 13, and wife before turning gun on himself in horrific murder-suicide
articles.description: A POLICE officer is suspected of shooting dead his wife and two children before turning the gun on himself in a horror murder-suicide. The harrowing ordeal took place in Villers-en-Arthies, just outside of Paris. The picturesque town has since been completely blocked off as authorities desperately try to work out what happened. The two children...

articles.title: Four Canadians head to B.C. to isolate from hantavirus cruise
articles.description: Four Canadian passengers who were onboard MV Hondius during a hantavrius will fly to an airport near Quebec City where they'll switch planes to return to British Columbia.

articles.title: Toddler killed in fall from North York apartment balcony
articles.description: A young child has died after falling from an apartment building in North York on Sunday afternoon, police say.

articles.title: British army drops paratroopers onto remote Atlantic island to help hantavirus-infected cruise ship passenger
articles.description: A team of British Army medics and paratroopers airdropped onto the remote Atlantic island of Tristan de Cunha Saturday to render aid to a British national suspected of contracting hantavirus on the MV Hondius.

articles.title: Embassy break-in exposes China-Japan trust at 'historic low'
articles.description: An incident involving a Japanese soldier allegedly scaling the wall of China's embassy in Tokyo a month ago has become a lightning rod in a tension-riddled landscape between China and Japan.
